vulnerability.title: The Installed Operating System Is Vendor Supported
vulnerability.description: The installed operating system must be maintained by a vendor. Red Hat Enterprise Linux is supported by Red Hat, Inc. As the Red Hat Enterprise Linux vendor, Red Hat, Inc. is responsible for providing security patches.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: The Installed Operating System Is Vendor Supported
vulnerability.group: Operating System Vendor Support and Certification

triage_decision.reason: The finding is a compliance check for vendor support. Remediation involves verifying OS support status and applying updates if needed, which are low-risk operations not involving critical system components like authentication or networking.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Using an unsupported OS may lead to unpatched security vulnerabilities.
